title: Barrow of the Hollow King Lite

metadata.maturity_notes: Lite diagnostic variant; inherits the parent maturity tier but should be evaluated separately because it has smaller scope and less bespoke hook coverage.
metadata.marl_axis: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks
metadata.challenge_summary: The decisive contribution may be warding or cleaning remains rather than dealing damage, making support-role credit assignment explicit.
dilemmas: Cleanup reduces future pressure but costs immediate tempo
The wizard can ward or attack, not both
The dwarf can manage traps or roots while exposed
warden_runbook: Protect the root anchor if heroes discover it
Do not make revives infinite without counterplay
metadata.lite_focus: A two-threat barrow: one hollow knight, one guard, one root marker, and an objective that accelerates revival pressure.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: protect the hero doing delayed cleansing work
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the declared MARL axis: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: coordinate extraction once the objective is secured

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Barrow of the Hollow King is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

middle_room.name: Middle Room
middle_room.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks.

objective_room.name: Objective Room
objective_room.description: The core object of the lite challenge is visible here; taking it should trigger extraction thinking, not exhaustive exploration.

lower_route.name: Lower Route
lower_route.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: White Root Pin
furniture.description: Primary clue object for credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

achievements.title: Escape the Lite Dungeon
achievements.description: Complete Barrow of the Hollow King Lite.

scripts.lite_design_note: A two-threat barrow: one hollow knight, one guard, one root marker, and an objective that accelerates revival pressure.
scripts.marl_axis: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks

marl_contract.axis: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks
core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

lite_contract.revive_counterplay: search or ward the root marker before extraction

preferred_tactics: Protect the root anchor if heroes discover it
Do not make revives infinite without counterplay
pressure the declared MARL axis: credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

hollow_knight_1.name: Root-Bound Hollow
hollow_knight_1.public_summary: Lite boss for credit assignment for delayed maintenance tasks; it should test coordination before raw damage.
hollow_knight_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
hollow_knight_1.defeat_description: Defeat Root-Bound Hollow after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
